mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, COALESCE(u.avatar, '') AS avatar, p.content, p.images, COALESCE(p.video, '') AS video, CASE p.audit_status WHEN 0 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 1 THEN 'APPROVED' ELSE 'REJECTED' END AS status, '' AS auditReason, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_collect lc WHERE lc.target_id = p.id AND lc.type = 1) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment cm WHERE cm.post_id = p.id AND cm.deleted = 0) AS commentCount, p.circle_id AS circleId, c.name AS circleName, CASE WHEN p.ai_generated = 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS aiGenerated, p.create_time AS createTime FROM post p LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN circle c ON p.circle_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0
p.deleted = 0 AND p.audit_status = 0
AND (p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, COALESCE(u.avatar, '') AS avatar, p.content, p.images, COALESCE(p.video, '') AS video, CASE p.audit_status WHEN 0 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 1 THEN 'APPROVED' ELSE 'REJECTED' END AS status, '' AS auditReason, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_collect lc WHERE lc.target_id = p.id AND lc.type = 1) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment cm WHERE cm.post_id = p.id AND cm.deleted = 0) AS commentCount, p.circle_id AS circleId, c.name AS circleName, CASE WHEN p.ai_generated = 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS aiGenerated, p.create_time AS createTime FROM post p LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN circle c ON p.circle_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0
p.deleted = 0 AND p.audit_status IN (1, 2)
AND (p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
